SERVICE.INFO: Please select the desired WFS endpoint.
SERVICE.LABEL: Servicetype:

TARGET.TITLE: Toolbar button
TARGET.LABEL: Targetmode:
TARGET.INFO:
Ad hoc mode always shows a targetpage selectionmenu.
Focus mode opens the preselected targetpage directly. (You can still switch the targetpage by holding down the button temporarily.)

SCALE.TITLE: Browserpage
SCALE.LABEL: Adjust scale:
SCALE.INFO: The maprepresentation of each website will be called with the same scale as the current document. The size of the websitemap may still be different due to system- and browsersettings. The scalesetting allows you to adjust the requested representation.
